overview.description: IT consulting and AI services firm specialising in AI agents, automation, software development, and Oracle database solutions
overview.description_long: Buinsoft Technology S.R.O. is a Prague-based IT consulting company offering AI agents, workflow automation, software development, Oracle database management, and IT outsourcing. They serve SMBs and enterprises across multiple industries, deploying ready-made and custom AI automations built with tools like n8n. The team claims 15+ years of combined IT expertise and operates across multiple continents with multilingual support in 9 languages.
overview.tagline: IT Consulting Firm — AI & Software & Database @Prague

history.origin_story: Founded by Emre Alemdar in Prague, Czechia. The team has 15+ years of combined IT experience. Company vision targets becoming a player in IT-as-a-Service.

metadata.notes: Small Prague-based IT consulting/AI services firm. Legal name: Buinsoft Technology S.R.O. Address: Na Folimance 2155/15, Vinohrady, 120 00 Praha 2. Contact: +420-778-406-906, info@buinsoft.com. Website copyright ©2025. No Wayback Machine snapshots available. No CNAIP entry found. 15+ years team experience claimed but company founding year unknown. Employees range estimated as 1-10 based on small consultancy profile.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Consulting/services model is highly vulnerable as AI tools enable clients to do work in-house.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Small team with no visible customer traction or market validation signals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known funding and very small team. High dependency on bootstrapped revenue or future fundraising.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Multiple high-risk factors across AGI displacement, market, or funding dimensions.
